Class Level

java.lang.Object
generation.Level
public class Level extends Object
Represents a game level, managing the map, player movement, and game rules.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Level(String filename, Player player)
    Constructs a new Level from a file.

    Returns the enemy at position (i, j), or null if none is present.

    Gets the map grid.

  • Constructor Details

    • Level

      public Level(String filename, Player player)
      Constructs a new Level from a file. Randomly places the player on a valid empty spot.
      Parameters:
      filename - Path to the level configuration file.
      player - The player to place in this level.

  • Method Details

    • getEnemies

      public List<Enemy> getEnemies()
      Gets the list of all enemies in this level.
      Returns:
      The list of Enemy instances.

    • getNumberOfCoins

      public int getNumberOfCoins()
      Gets the current number of coins remaining.
      Returns:
      The number of coins.

    • setNumberOfCoins

      public void setNumberOfCoins(int coins)
      Sets the number of coins.
      Parameters:
      coins - The new number of coins.

    • getNumberOfLevels

      public static int getNumberOfLevels()
      Gets the total number of levels created.
      Returns:
      The number of levels.

    • getRows

      public int getRows()
      Gets the number of rows in the map.
      Returns:
      The number of rows.

    • getCols

      public int getCols()
      Gets the number of columns in the map.
      Returns:
      The number of columns.

    • getMap

      public Cell[][] getMap()
      Gets the map grid.
      Returns:
      The 2D Cell array representing the map.

    • setMap

      public void setMap(String[] stringMap)
      Initializes the map from string array.
      Parameters:
      stringMap - Array of strings representing rows.

    • getPlayer

      public Player getPlayer()
      Gets the player instance.
      Returns:
      The player.

    • isEnemyAt

      public boolean isEnemyAt(int i, int j)
      Checks in O(1) whether any enemy occupies the cell at (i, j).
      Parameters:
      i - The row index.
      j - The column index.
      Returns:
      true if an enemy is on that cell, false otherwise.

    • getEnemyAt

      public Enemy getEnemyAt(int i, int j)
      Returns the enemy at position (i, j), or null if none is present. Used for display purposes to determine the enemy type (e.g. Ghost vs Zombie).
      Parameters:
      i - The row index.
      j - The column index.
      Returns:
      The Enemy at that position, or null.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a full string representation of the level for console display. Includes player stats, level info, and the map with the player's position overlaid.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      A multi-line string representing the current level state.

    • resetEnemies

      public void resetEnemies()
      Resets all enemies to their initial positions and rebuilds the occupied cells set. Called after the player collides with an enemy or falls into a trap.

    • update

      public void update()
      Updates the game state based on player input. Handles movement, scoring, and collisions.

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Entry point for testing the Level class independently.
      Parameters:
      args - Command line arguments (unused).
